summary_draft: China-linked exchange project started in early 2013 and later operated under the LakeBTC domain; third-party trackers later marked it dead or inactive, but the terminal state still needs stronger official evidence.
evidence_notes: Current terminal evidence is tracker-driven, not yet a preserved official closure notice.
Do not force death_reason until stronger primary or archived official material is found.
Need archive plus at least two non-archive sources before public_ready promotion.

event_candidates.title: LakeBTC project start window
event_candidates.description: LakeBTC later described the project as having started in early 2013 before being incorporated and operated under the current domain later that year.

event_candidates.title: Site flagged inaccessible / inactive
event_candidates.description: By July 2021, third-party exchange trackers reported that the LakeBTC website was inaccessible and marked the venue inactive or dead.

risks: dead-side outcome may be correct in practice but evidence is still soft
origin and later corporate structure may need fuller notes
final_notes: Keep LakeBTC conservative as inactive for now.
Next step: find stronger archived official material around the final inactive period.
